polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly one paragraph, starting with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words. Data: only one market: "Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?: Yes 38% (vol $261,094)". So probability of dip is 38%, implying 62% chance it stays above $1,500. That suggests bullish sentiment (since less likely to dip). So start with "Bullish:" then mention that only 38% expect dip, volume $261k, indicating confidence Ethereum will stay above $1.5k. Must be one paragraph, max 80 words. Let's craft ~30 words.

"Bullish: The prediction market shows only a 38% chance Ethereum will fall to $1,500 by end‑2026, with $261,094 traded, implying a 62% likelihood it remains above that level and reflecting overall optimism about ETH’s price trajectory."

Count words: Bullish:(1) The2 prediction3 market4 shows5 only6 a7 38%8 chance9 Ethereum10 will11 fall12 to13 $1,500
